{{Infobox character
| name = Dross
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[dream madra]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|, combat solutions and predictions, dream simulation}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|, combat Presence, audible speech illusions}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Keeper of the Dream Well, [[Eye of the Deep]], Omni-codex}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Akura clan]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|guide-construct, memory construct}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|, companion}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|, [[Pilot|pilot]]}}
| birthplace = {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Ghostwater]]}}
| residence = {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon's core|Lindon's pure core]], a gem in Lindon's pocket}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|, Lindon's mind and spirit}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Ghostwater (novel)|Ghostwater]]
}}

''See also: [[Dross Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Dross is a unique memory [[construct]] and spirit originally discovered by [[Lindon]] within an oracle tree in [[Ghostwater]]. Though composed of a compilation of various minds and spirits, Dross has developed into an individual entity. He is often described as a purple-skinned, one-eyed creature with tendril-like arms, though his physical form is highly adaptable. His appearance has evolved from a nebulous cloud of light and phantom gears into more substantial forms, including a version with skin, a mouth, and teeth that resembles an advanced remnant or a cross between a spirit and a sacred beast. He has also utilized various vessels, such as a sapphire gem or a rusted metal ball, to house his [[essence]]. Dross serves as an invaluable companion and asset to [[Lindon]], providing expertise in areas such as [[Soulsmithing]] due to his foundation of information constructs left by [[Soulsmiths]]. He possesses the ability to process vast amounts of information, communicate remotely, and manifest himself physically or as a combat presence. His capabilities include assisting with the separation of memories and even piloting vessels. Despite his specialized knowledge and power, Dross is prone to physical strain when over-exerting himself, which has previously led to significant changes in his form. He is characterized by a distinct personality that ranges from inquisitive and theatrical to occasionally cowardly or indignant.}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Originally a rusted metal ball and memory [[construct]] known by derogatory names like junk or waste, Dross gained the ability to think and combine words after spending a long time in the [[Dream Well]]. After being merged with a sapphire, this [[Eye of the Deep]] transformed into a defined orb containing an interlocking mechanism of gears and two cores. Now residing in a gem within [[Lindon]]'s pocket, the entity—who prefers to be called Omni-codex—has developed madra channels and is forming its own core. This living [[construct]] can drift as a purple cloud of light and phantom gears, or manifest as an ethereal spirit with a round body, one eye, and a mouth. As it continues to grow, the being is becoming opaque with skin and resembles a cross between a spirit and a sacred beast.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Dross]] is a [[construct]] that identifies as the Keeper of the [[Dream Well]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c6">''Ghostwater'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Dross]] is a guide-[[construct]] built near the [[Dream Well]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Dross]] was previously referred to by names such as garbage, defect, junk, chaff, waste, failure, dregs, slag, scum, refuse, and dross.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Dross]] is a [[construct]] that gained the ability to think and combine words in new ways after falling into the [[Dream Well]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Dross]] is a memory [[construct]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Dross]] is a rusted metal ball.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Dross]] uses dream madra.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Dross]] is capable of being bound to a gem like an original [[construct]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Dross]] is a living [[construct]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c8">''Ghostwater'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Dross]]'s form is a purple cloud filled with violet sparks.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|After being merged with the sapphire, [[Dross]]'s form becomes a defined orb containing an interlocking mechanism of gears.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Dross]] has two cores.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Dross]] gained senses like a [[Jade]] after the operation.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Dross]] is an [[Eye of the Deep]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Dross]]'s insides consist of a mass of phantom gears and clouds of sparks.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Dross]] wants to be called Omni-codex.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Dross]] refers to the pockets of air within giant bubbles as habitats.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Dross]] is a floating ball of purple light.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c9">''Ghostwater'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Dross]] is a gem that can flash.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Dross]] is a gem that contains [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Dross]] is a gem that can drift out as a cloud of shifting purple gears and swimming violet lights.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c10">''Ghostwater'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Dross]] is a [[construct]] that can lose memories as he decays.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c11">''Ghostwater'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Dross]] emits a purple light.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c12">''Ghostwater'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Dross]] is a jewel/gem.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Dross]] can drift as a floating purple cloud of light and phantom gears.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Dross]] is a [[construct]] that has entered [[Lindon]]'s pure core.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c13">''Ghostwater'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Dross]]'s spirit-form is an ethereal ball of turning gears and spinning violet lights.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Dross]] resides inside [[Lindon]]'s pure core.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Dross]] believes he will qualify as a living spirit after his current stage of growth.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15">''Ghostwater'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Dross]] is forming a core of his own.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Dross]] has developed madra channels and a core.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Dross]] resides in a gem in [[Lindon]]'s pocket.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Dross]] is a [[construct]] that spins inside [[Lindon's core]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Dross]] is becoming opaque and growing skin.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Dross]] spent a long time in the [[Dream Well]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Dross]] is described as looking like an advanced [[Remnant]] or a cross between a spirit and a sacred beast.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Dross]] was taken by an [[Akura]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c16">''Ghostwater'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Dross]] has traveled with [[Lindon]] for four weeks.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] intends to bring [[Dross]] back.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Dross]] is a spirit that flows out of [[Lindon]]'s vessel and has a round body with one eye and a mouth.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c18">''Ghostwater'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Dross]] is a spirit that can be drawn into [[Lindon's core]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Dross]] can focus his eye on a person.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c19">''Ghostwater'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Dross is a one-eyed, purple spirit with pebbly skin and stubby arms that exists as a parasite infesting [[Lindon]]'s soul. As a mental [[construct]] with a fully formed consciousness and a [[madra]] system tied to [[Lindon]]'s brain, he can reside at the base of [[Lindon]]'s skull or exit the soul to hover on his shoulder. He functions by using [[Lindon]]'s senses and processing unimportant thoughts to increase concentration, while also running on excess [[dream aura]] and requiring [[Dream Well water]]. Dross utilizes information constructs to simulate experiments, model behaviors like Prince [[Kiro]]'s, and provide combat solutions or predictions. Beyond assisting with technical tasks such as weapon making or [[Soulsmithing]], he can communicate through thoughts, recite mantras regarding [[aura]], and even alter memories while others sleep.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Dross]] is a mental [[construct]] that can project words into minds.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c2">''Underlord'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Dross]] is a thought-[[construct]] that can use [[Lindon]]'s senses.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] can use [[Dross]] to send intentions.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Dross]] can handle unimportant thoughts to increase [[Lindon]]'s concentration and processing speed.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c3">''Underlord'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Dross]] can gather information on [[Paths]] and behavior to model them.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Dross]] is a one-eyed spirit with pebbly purple skin and two stubby, boneless arms.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Dross]] is a character in the story.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Dross]] can speak directly into [[Lindon]]'s thoughts.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c4">''Underlord'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Dross]] spoke up to [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Dross]] is a companion of [[Lindon]] who can glow.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c7">''Underlord'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Dross]] is aware that no one in the [[Akura clan]] knows [[Mercy]] left [[Harmony]] to die.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Dross]] is watching [[Eithan]]'s presentation.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8">''Underlord'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Dross]] is a spirit with a fully formed consciousness and [[madra]] system tied to [[Lindon]]'s brain.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Dross]] is one-eyed and purple.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Dross]] is a parasite infesting [[Lindon]]'s soul.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Dross]] is a character who can exit [[Lindon]]'s soul and hover on his shoulder.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Dross]] can speak.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Dross]] recites a mantra about the unity of [[aura]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c9">''Underlord'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Dross]]'s mantra describes [[soulfire]] as [[vital aura]] distilled.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Dross]] is an entity [[Lindon]] communicates with silently.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Dross]]' voice interrupted [[Yerin]]'s cycling meditation.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c10">''Underlord'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Dross]] has built a model of Prince [[Kiro]]'s behavior.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11">''Underlord'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Dross]] is a spirit that smooths out [[Lindon]]'s thoughts.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Dross]] runs on excess [[dream aura]] produced by [[Lindon]]'s mind.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Dross]] can provide combat solutions and predictions.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Dross]] requires [[Dream Well water]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Dross]] is a spirit.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c12">''Underlord'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Dross]] is a spirit that uses [[Lindon]]'s senses.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Dross]] lacks a stomach or digestive system.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Dross]] tried to guess his gift and trick [[Eithan]] into giving him hints during the journey.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c14">''Underlord'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Dross]] is a spirit that can reside at the base of [[Lindon]]'s skull.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Dross]] has stubby purple arms.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Dross]] has absorbed many information constructs from [[Ghostwater]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Dross]] can simulate experiments in [[Lindon]]'s head.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Dross]] can make weapons if he has blueprints.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Dross]] is a character who communicates with [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c15">''Underlord'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Dross]] informed [[Lindon]] that the cloudship's tubes were for propulsion.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c17">''Underlord'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Dross]] provides information about [[Little Blue]]'s abilities.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Dross]] is a purple spirit that works through [[Lindon's body]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c18">''Underlord'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Dross]] can alter memories while people sleep.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Dross]] can slide out of [[Lindon's body]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Dross]] can assist a [[Soulsmith]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19">''Underlord'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Dross]] has shown [[Lindon]] the effect of a combination of techniques in a dream simulation.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Dross]] provides combat reports.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20">''Underlord'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Dross]] examined [[Lindon's axe]] with him.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Dross]] has a large eye taking up most of his purple body.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21">''Underlord'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Dross]] can suggest using [[Sage's madra]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Dross]] has gone with [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c22">''Underlord'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|A spirit created from [[Northstrider]]'s [[Ghostwater]], Dross resides within [[Lindon]]'s mind and spirit as a companion who can whistle. This entity enjoys games, provides conversations to aid focus, and uses a mental voice to guide [[Lindon]]'s combat and offer observations. Dross can enhance [[Lindon]]'s mind, process the [[essence]] of a scale, simulate battles with improved [[Pride]] models or even a model of [[Yerin]], and play back memories. Throughout various trials, Dross provides strategic suggestions, explains context clues, and acts as a tool for taking notes. While the mind-spirit can manifest over [[Lindon]]'s shoulder to provide a combat edge, Dross eventually becomes exhausted and appears silent and afraid.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Dross]] resides within [[Lindon]]'s mind and spirit.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c2">''Uncrowned'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Dross]] enjoys games.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Dross]] is a companion of [[Lindon]] who can whistle.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c3">''Uncrowned'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Dross]] can enhance [[Lindon]]'s mind.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Dross]] is a spirit created from [[Northstrider]]'s [[Ghostwater]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c4">''Uncrowned'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Dross]] can process the [[essence]] of a scale.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Dross]] can simulate battles.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Dross]] pointed out the [[Sage]]'s owl to [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c5">''Uncrowned'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Dross]] watches [[Lindon]] all the time.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Dross]] provides [[Lindon]] with conversations to help him focus.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c6">''Uncrowned'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Dross]] has a [[Pride]] model that was significantly improved.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Dross]] created a model of [[Yerin]] for [[Lindon]] to fight.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c7">''Uncrowned'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Dross]] can see why [[Lindon]] might be worried.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c9">''Uncrowned'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Dross]] is capable of explaining context clues.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Dross]] suggests [[Lindon]] use [[dragon]]'s breath to attack the base.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c11">''Uncrowned'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Dross]] suggested [[Lindon]] bribe the man in the second trial.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Dross]] can play memories back for [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c12">''Uncrowned'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Dross]] is an entity that [[Lindon]] uses to take notes.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c13">''Uncrowned'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Dross]] notes that [[Lindon's mother]] is watching.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Dross]] can count the number of people present.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c14">''Uncrowned'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Dross]] provides information and observations.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Dross]] can provide [[Lindon]] with an edge in combat.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Dross]] guides [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15">''Uncrowned'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Dross]] is a character who spoke to [[Lindon]] and called the crown an imposter.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] can train against a model of [[Dross]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Dross]] is a mind-spirit that [[Lindon]] worries about.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c16">''Uncrowned'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] planned to figure something out with [[Dross]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Dross]] can manifest over [[Lindon]]'s shoulder.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c19">''Uncrowned'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Dross]] has a mental voice.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c20">''Uncrowned'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Dross]] guides [[Lindon]]'s combat.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Dross]] was exhausted after [[Lindon]]'s attack.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Dross]] was silent and seemed afraid.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c21">''Uncrowned'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Born from the final days of [[Ghostwater]], Dross is a partially material mind-spirit who emerged from the oracle codex to accompany [[Lindon]]. As a companion capable of observing [[Lindon]] and providing combat solutions, the entity can reside within [[Lindon's armor]], take control of [[Wavedancer]], and use limited information to assist with perception. Throughout their travels with [[Charity]], Dross utilizes [[dream aura]] to function, performing mental tests and creating predictive models for various subjects including [[Blacksword]], [[Mercy]], and Sophara. The spirit assists [[Lindon]] by processing energies with the [[Heart of Twin Stars]], suggesting names for new techniques, and sorting through memories to help reason through complex situations. After helping [[Northstrider]] assemble a weapon and providing [[Yerin]] with records, Dross continues to communicate via messages and provide warnings while traveling with the group.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dross]] is a mind-spirit born from [[Ghostwater]] in its last days.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c2">''Wintersteel'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dross]] is present with [[Lindon]] and reacts to the [[Abidan]]'s arrival.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dross]] popped up onto [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] faced [[Dross]] after his confusion regarding [[Suriel]]'s visit.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c3">''Wintersteel'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dross]] can steal memories.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dross]] is not completely material.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dross]] can provide combat solutions.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4">''Wintersteel'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dross]] is an entity that can observe [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6">''Wintersteel'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dross]] created a predictive model for [[Blacksword]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dross]] is a companion of [[Lindon]] who provides commentary.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7">''Wintersteel'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Northstrider]] is testing [[Dross]] to see if his initiative and ability to propose solutions are tied to his personality and self-awareness.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Northstrider]] is testing [[Dross]]'s capacity, resolve, and spiritual structure to see if replication is possible without waiting fifty years.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dross]] emerged from the oracle codex.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Northstrider]] indicated he would come to [[Lindon]] whenever he required [[Dross]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dross]] suggested the gathering might be due to the position of the stars.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8">''Wintersteel'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dross]] is someone [[Yerin]] will see again in a month.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] asked [[Dross]] for help with his [[Remnant]] arm.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c9">''Wintersteel'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dross]] finds the sacred [[spiders]] fascinating.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dross]] suggested the name [[Hollow Domain]] for [[Lindon]]'s new technique.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10">''Wintersteel'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dross]] can provide reminders of [[Lindon]]'s fights.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dross]] comments on [[Lindon]]'s appearance.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dross]] helped [[Lindon]] separate and process energies using the [[Heart of Twin Stars]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c13">''Wintersteel'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dross]] can use limited information to assist [[Lindon]]'s perception.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dross]] can take control of [[Wavedancer]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dross]] can reside within [[Lindon's armor]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dross]] can perform tests inside his mind.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14">''Wintersteel'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dross]] is traveling with [[Lindon]] and [[Charity]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dross]] runs on [[dream aura]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dross]] can remember facts from tests and records from the tournament.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dross]] completed a model of [[Mercy]] and Sophara.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17">''Wintersteel'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dross]] believes [[Lindon]] can handle [[Yerin's Blood Shadow]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18">''Wintersteel'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dross]] drifts in the darkness with [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dross]] can project images onto a deck.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dross]] sorts through [[Lindon]]'s memories.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c23">''Wintersteel'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dross]] helped [[Lindon]] reason through the possibility of draining [[madra]] from the [[Wandering Titan]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dross]] is a spirit that can connect to [[dream tablets]] and memorize them.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dross]] hovered over [[Lindon]]'s face.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25">''Wintersteel'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dross]] provided an analysis of Sophara's fighting style to [[Ruby]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dross]] is a character who gave [[Yerin]] records of Sophara.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26">''Wintersteel'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dross]] is a companion to [[Lindon]] who provides scenarios.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dross]] reported that [[Yerin]] won.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dross]] helped bring [[Northstrider]]'s weapon together.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dross]] pointed out that it would be rude not to join the gang.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dross]] shouted a warning.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dross]] communicates with [[Lindon]] via messages.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dross]] holds onto memories.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dross]] warned [[Lindon]] that Sophara would be back up in about two seconds.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dross]] told [[Lindon]] he was not an [[Overlord]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28">''Wintersteel'', chapter 28</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|As a spirit capable of speaking into minds, Dross can return images and experiences a twisty sensation during spatial travel. While left at the controls of the fortress, Dross manages ship orders, reports on communication constructs, and corrects [[Lindon]]'s counts of both the [[Irons]] and [[Li clan]] members. Trapped inside a living skull, this powerful tool can soothe egos, restrain [[Lindon]]'s murderous impulses, and manipulate light images to assign tasks. Dross provides simulations, shares memories of the tournament, and assists with targeting constructs while offering strategic battle plans. Ultimately, Dross exists as a loose cloud of dream madra within [[Lindon]]'s soul and is an entity that does not truly die except under extraordinary circumstances.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Dross]] can return images.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c3">''Bloodline'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Dross]] can whistle in [[Lindon]]'s mind.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c4">''Bloodline'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Dross]] experiences spatial travel as feeling twisty.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Dross]] is left at the controls of the fortress.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c5">''Bloodline'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] gave orders to [[Dross]] regarding the ships.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6">''Bloodline'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Dross]] is ready.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Dross]] reports that communication constructs are being passed out.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Dross]] suggested [[Mercy]] keep [[Yerin]] company.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Dross]] corrected [[Lindon]]'s count of the [[Irons]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Dross]] exists in a physical form.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c8">''Bloodline'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Dross]] is a character that can restrain [[Lindon]]'s murderous impulses.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9">''Bloodline'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Dross]] is trapped inside a living skull.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Dross]] can soothe egos.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Dross]] can manipulate light images to assign tasks.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Dross]] is a spirit capable of speaking into people's minds.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c11">''Bloodline'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Dross]] knows things that [[Lindon]] does not.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Dross]] can contact the [[Golds]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c12">''Bloodline'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Dross]] reports on the [[First Elder]]'s technique.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Dross]] sent a garbled transmission to [[Eithan]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c13">''Bloodline'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Dross]] corrects [[Lindon]]'s count of the [[Li clan]] members.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15">''Bloodline'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Dross]] shouted for [[Lindon]] to look east.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Dross]] can show [[Lindon]] memories of the tournament.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c16">''Bloodline'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Dross]] can provide simulations.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Dross]] has an eye that can swivel.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Dross]] is a powerful tool.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17">''Bloodline'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Dross]] is an entity that shares memories and observations with [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18">''Bloodline'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Dross]] panicked when [[Lindon]] looked into [[Suriel]]'s marble.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Dross]] points out that advancing inside the suppression field won't be an advantage.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Dross]] assists [[Lindon]] with targeting constructs.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] asked [[Dross]] for a battle plan.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19">''Bloodline'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Dross]] gave a squeal and then covered it up with a cough.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Dross]] spoke into the characters' heads.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Dross]] can accelerate his perception.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Dross]] can project himself into [[Mercy]]'s mind.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Dross]] informs [[Mercy]] that they need her to fight the [[Titan]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Dross]] delivers instructions to [[Lindon]] and others.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c20">''Bloodline'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Dross]] is a spirit that guides [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Dross]] does not really die except under truly extraordinary circumstances.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c21">''Bloodline'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Dross]] exists as a loose cloud of dream madra within [[Lindon]]'s soul.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c22">''Bloodline'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Initially appearing as an unconscious purple mass of spiritual power at the base of [[Lindon]]'s skull, Dross is a memory spirit composed of many minds and spirits that [[Lindon]] seeks to repair. After undergoing a period of instability where the entity appeared as a pale, passionless gray blob with a single eye and sharp teeth, Dross is eventually fixed using the [[Soulforge]]. The spirit evolves into an almighty mind-spirit of true power wearing a tiny, spiked black crown, a transformation that cannot be reversed. As a living [[construct]] capable of simulating [[Soulsmithing]] projects and slowing down the world, Dross provides [[Lindon]] with combat reports, locates bindings, and offers vital information regarding [[dream tablets]] and the [[labyrinth]]. Now a ball of dream madra that can tear holes in the world, Dross carries the burden of glorious knowledge and desires to ascend.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Dross]] is a purple mass of spiritual power at the base of [[Lindon]]'s skull.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c2">''Reaper'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Dross]] is someone [[Lindon]] wishes was present to help sort his thoughts.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Dross]] is an entity that [[Lindon]] needs to repair/awaken.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c3">''Reaper'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] wishes he had [[Dross]] to talk to.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4">''Reaper'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Dross]] is present with [[Lindon]], though currently unconscious.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Dross]] is someone [[Lindon]] believes would love the spiritual space inside [[Mercy]]'s book.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Dross]] is gone.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Dross]] is a character [[Lindon]] thinks about.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c6">''Reaper'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Dross]] is a memory spirit composed of many minds and spirits.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7">''Reaper'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Dross]]'s form can be manifested as a spinning purple ball of [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Dross]]'s internal structure consists of organic rings and madra channels.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] needs to fix [[Dross]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Dross]] is more stable than he has been in a long time.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c9">''Reaper'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Dross]] is a purple blob that has become a pale and washed-out gray color.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Dross]]'s current personality is a dry and passionless recital of words.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Dross]]'s physical form consists of one large eye, one mouth with sharp teeth, and two boneless pseudopod arms.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Dross]] pointed out that the [[Sword Sage]] made it out of the [[labyrinth]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c10">''Reaper'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Dross]] states the foundation of the facility predates the founding of the Arelius line by several centuries.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Dross]] logs weaknesses for future reference.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c11">''Reaper'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Dross]] warns that [[madra]] or [[soulfire]] expended in battle is difficult to replace.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Dross]] can locate bindings.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c12">''Reaper'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Dross]] is a spirit that can simulate [[Soulsmithing]] projects.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c13">''Reaper'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] wants to use the [[Soulforge]] to fix [[Dross]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Dross]] provides information to [[Lindon]] regarding the [[dream tablets]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c14">''Reaper'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Dross]] informs [[Lindon]] that the environment lacks a way to replenish [[dream aura]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Dross]] can link [[Lindon]] to constructs.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c16">''Reaper'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Dross]] can slow down the world.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Dross]] suggests [[Reigan Shen]] is trying to preserve lives or the tridents.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Dross]] pitted himself against the technique.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Dross]] mentioned that [[Northstrider]] once used him to develop a combat report against [[Reigan Shen]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17">''Reaper'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Dross]] assessed that [[Eithan]] was denying an advancement to [[Sage]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Dross]] has evolved into a spirit of true power.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Dross]] wears a tiny, spiked black crown.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Dross]]'s evolution cannot be reversed.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Dross]] claims the [[labyrinth]] fed upon [[Mercy's mother]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c18">''Reaper'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Dross]] spoke to [[Lindon]] arrogantly.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19">''Reaper'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Dross]] cackled in [[Lindon]]'s head.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Dross]] has a shell.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c20">''Reaper'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Dross]] can declare that an application of [[hunger madra]] is outside a person's understanding.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Dross]] is an almighty mind-spirit.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Dross]] can help restore [[Lindon]]'s strength.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c21">''Reaper'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Dross]] can tear a hole in the world.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Dross]] stated that [[Reigan Shen]] had slain the beast.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c22">''Reaper'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Dross]] volunteered to be the first test subject for hunger binding.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Dross]] states that the dead [[Dreadgod]]'s information will support his purpose.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Dross]] is a ball of dream madra at the base of [[Lindon]]'s skull.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23">''Reaper'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Dross]] provided silent support to [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Dross]] is mentioned in relation to time slowing.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Dross]] provides combat solutions and reports to [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Dross]] is a living [[construct]] of [[Lindon]]'s making.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25">''Reaper'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Dross]] carries the burden of glorious knowledge.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Dross]] is a spirit with a large eye.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26">''Reaper'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Dross]] is a [[construct]] that [[Eithan]] cannot repair unless it prevents further damage to the world.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] asks [[Dross]] to remember runes.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c27">''Reaper'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Dross]] wants to ascend.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c27" />}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|After being damaged by over-drafting himself for [[Lindon]], the mind-[[construct]] Dross transformed into a new form as a dark, floating echo. This spirit, who can manifest in the air and feed on excess [[dream aura]], possesses functions beyond anything normally possible in [[Cradle]], such as examining the structure of Divine Treasures and simulating death permutations to avoid [[Titans]]. During a vision involving the [[Silent King]], Dross was shoved aside by the [[Dreadgod]] but eventually helped prevent [[Lindon]] from collapsing by absorbing dream aspects and memories. Following this, Dross emerged with pebbly light-purple skin and a purple-white halo. Now acting as [[Lindon]]'s companion, the dream-spirit can create illusory clones, dismantle techniques, and provide predictions while residing within [[Lindon]]'s spirit.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] was damaged by over-drafting himself for [[Lindon]]'s sake.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c2">''Dreadgod'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] has transformed into a new form.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]]'s functions are beyond anything normally possible in [[Cradle]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] is an echo.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] is a spirit that can inspect details of the [[labyrinth]] and remember them.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] desires the dream madra of the [[Silent King]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] is a dark, floating spirit with an unnerving voice.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3">''Dreadgod'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] identifies himself as [[Dross]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] can receive [[dream aura]] from [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] is dark in color.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] can manifest in the air.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] whispers that [[Lindon]] is a man at war with an internal battlefield.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] can examine the structure of Divine Treasures.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] is a spirit that can project memories and echoes.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] is theorizing countermeasures against the [[Dreadgod]]'s possession.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c4">''Dreadgod'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] is a mind-[[construct]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] is a dark-minded entity that [[Lindon]] has grown used to.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] drifts out of the back of [[Lindon]]’s neck.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c5">''Dreadgod'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] can explain images and shift attention to others.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] has no fingers.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] can see that [[Lindon]] is spending time alone with [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6">''Dreadgod'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] is a character who spoke to [[Lindon]] about testing the barrier.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c7">''Dreadgod'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] pilots [[Windfall]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c8">''Dreadgod'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] is paranoid.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] has a current personality.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c10">''Dreadgod'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] returned to the depths of [[Lindon]]'s spirit.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c12">''Dreadgod'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] can drift and float.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] simulates death and destruction permutations to find ways to avoid the [[Titan]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c15">''Dreadgod'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] is silent while witnessing the battle.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] is capable of clearing [[Lindon]]'s memories in an instant.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] stated that even he could not unravel the [[Silent King]]'s lie or break his mirage.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c16">''Dreadgod'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] can materialize.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] communicates with [[Kelsa]] through her mind.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17">''Dreadgod'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] has a dark-purple shape.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c18">''Dreadgod'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] also feeds on excess [[dream aura]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] is [[Lindon]]'s companion and mind-spirit.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] can materialize and shines violet.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] is present within the vision with [[Lindon]] and the [[Silent King]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Dreadgod]] shoved [[Dross]] aside.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] helped prevent [[Lindon]] from collapsing while consuming the [[Silent King]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19">''Dreadgod'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] absorbed the dream aspects and memories from the [[Silent King]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] wore a purple-white halo.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] is in [[Lindon]]'s spirit.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] has pebbly skin that is a light shade of purple.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] can manifest a purple-white halo over his head.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] whispered into [[Yerin]]'s mind.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] is aware of the physical effects on [[Lindon]]'s eyes and arm.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] can run simulations and cross-reference memories to build personality models.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21">''Dreadgod'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] states that [[Dreadgods]] have lived for thousands of years and are considered all but impossible to kill.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] can create a thousand copies of himself to distort senses.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] can point out other assignments in [[Everwood]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] can manifest and wink.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22">''Dreadgod'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] complained while [[Lindon]] seized [[Remnants]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] is [[Lindon]]'s dream-spirit.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23">''Dreadgod'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] can use dream madra to form illusory clones.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] can dismantle techniques.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] can show [[Lindon]] destinations.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] can provide predictions.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]]' [[madra]] can affect [[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]] simultaneously.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] has returned.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c24">''Dreadgod'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] spoke to [[Lindon]] while he was guiding a pocket world construct.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c24" />}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Born in the world of [[Ghostwater]], Dross is a mind-spirit that can manifest next to [[Lindon]] and communicate via a [[void key]]. As a limited copy of his original self, he interacts with [[Lindon]] and [[Ziel]] by offering catalogues of [[Soulsmith]] memories and providing projections or commentary during combat. Throughout various encounters, he has directed the oracle codex, helped locate the [[Sword Sage]]'s echo, and used the [[Void Icon]] to hide from a [[Monarch]]. After being slid into place to inhabit [[Mercy]]'s mind and senses, he transitioned into a red spirit form that is less powerful than his original body. Eventually, Dross evolved into a mighty hive-mind consisting of multiple instances that can perform impressions, simulate visual data, and increase [[Lindon]]'s perception speed.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] provides information about [[Mercy]]'s madra channels.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c2">''Waybound'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] notes that the items used are not simple constructs.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] can manifest next to [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] was born in the world of [[Ghostwater]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] wants to eat memories.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] is a character who does not need to breathe.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c3">''Waybound'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] spoke to [[Lindon]] in a strange manner.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] is a character interacting with [[Lindon]] and [[Ziel]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c4">''Waybound'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] has a catalogue of memories from [[Soulsmiths]] ready for [[Lindon]]'s consideration.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] provides projections and commentary during the fight.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c5">''Waybound'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] offered to chase the target via projection.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6">''Waybound'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] can taste thoughts.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c7">''Waybound'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] thinks [[Lindon]] is too much for the [[Array]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] communicates with [[Lindon]] and [[Ziel]] via a [[void key]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] helped [[Lindon]] find the [[Sword Sage]]'s echo.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c8">''Waybound'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] is watching [[Lindon]] take notes.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] commented that someone needs to take lessons from him on style.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9">''Waybound'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] is an entity that [[Orthos]] calls to halt the fight.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c10">''Waybound'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] is a temporary copy left to operate illusion constructs.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] has a model of [[Eithan]] at [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] may be responsible for [[Lindon]]'s ability to use certain techniques.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] may have benefited from the [[madra]] of the [[Silent King]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c11">''Waybound'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] was guided by [[Dross]]’ predictions.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] directed the oracle codex.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] is a mind-spirit that was at its limit handling [[Lindon]]'s memories.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12">''Waybound'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] exerted control over [[Northstrider's oracle codex]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] used the [[Void Icon]] to hide from the [[Monarch]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] is a limited copy of an original.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] put information into [[Yerin]]'s brain.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] shouted that [[Yerin]] and [[Tiberian]] were still inside the portal.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13">''Waybound'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] instructed [[Dross]] to move the [[labyrinth]] and feed its bindings with pieces of [[Subject One]]'s body.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c14">''Waybound'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] is unable to model the [[Weeping Dragon]] well.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c15">''Waybound'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] noted that [[Northstrider]] has many memories.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c17">''Waybound'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] can gasp with delight.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] instructs [[Blue]] to follow [[Dross]]'s directions.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] is helping the newborn [[Sage]] and [[Herald]] hold on.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18">''Waybound'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] performs calculations.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] was commanding [[Orthos]] and [[Little Blue]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19">''Waybound'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] is a copy of the original [[Dross]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20">''Waybound'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] can communicate with others and assist them in combat by being thrown as a spirit.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] inhabits [[Mercy]]'s mind and senses after being slid into place.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]]'s new spirit form is red.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] is able to communicate with [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] is not as powerful as he was in his original body.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] is a smaller copy of his original self.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] has become a mighty hive-mind consisting of multiple instances.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c21">''Waybound'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] suggested [[Lindon]] take a break and do some [[Soulsmithing]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] is a mind-spirit of unparalleled knowledge and cunning.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23">''Waybound'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] has multiple bodies.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] tells [[Lindon]] that [[Northstrider]] is calculating his angle in the interaction.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] suggests that if they kill [[Northstrider]], [[Yerin]] should be the one to do it.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c24">''Waybound'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] can simulate what [[Northstrider]] is seeing based on memories from an echo.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] can perform impressions of others.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]]'s eye can turn gold and he can sport a shaggy mane of hair.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] is aboard [[Windfall]] with [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] is [[Mercy]]'s [[Dross]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c25">''Waybound'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] can sense [[Lindon]]'s presence.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] is missing his original self.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] can put people to sleep.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26">''Waybound'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] suggested using the strength of the [[Dragon Icon]] to help [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] can highlight entities in [[Lindon]]'s vision.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27">''Waybound'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] suggested using [[Soul Cloak]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] helps [[Lindon]] identify pinpoint timing.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] sent mental attacks using a flood of [[dream aura]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] showed [[Yerin]] how the phantom would move.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|There are five Drosses.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] provides suggestions to [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] communicates with [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c28">''Waybound'', chapter 28</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] is an entity that can speak to [[Mercy]] and [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c28" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] provides instructions to [[Yerin]] for scratching runes into stone.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c29">''Waybound'', chapter 29</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] can project a reflection of a person like a mirror.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c29" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] is mentioned as part of the process to use [[the Queen]]'s [[Gift]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c29" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] reported on [[Reigan Shen]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30">''Waybound'', chapter 30</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] can tap into the [[Crown of the Silent King]] to magnify mental assaults.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] can send messages and create illusions of [[Ziel]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c32">''Waybound'', chapter 32</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] can project a giant version of himself with a giant purple eye.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c32" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] has run a sect before.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c36">''Waybound'', chapter 36</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] commented on the friendly natives.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c36" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] can send language to others.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c36" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] can increase [[Lindon]]'s perception speed.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c36" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] informs [[Lindon]] they have about thirty seconds.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c38">''Waybound'', chapter 38</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Dross is a red combat [[Presence]] and companion to [[Mercy]] who possesses the ability to manifest, often appearing on her shoulder. Though his connection to the [[Way]] has been reduced, weakening his predictive abilities, he can influence the oracle codex and receive information from the [[Presence of the Wolves]]. This entity, characterized by a single purple eye, boneless arms, and spiked teeth, can use the [[Silent King's madra]] to project audible speech illusions or mimic human speech. Dross serves as a spy for [[Ziel]] by monitoring [[Eternity]] facilities and can communicate through mental messages or direct speech with [[Lindon]], [[Yerin]], and [[Mercy]]. During various missions, he has used his power of memory to read others, warned of the [[Herald]] threat, and even discarded his [[veil]] to hold off a consciousness. Ultimately, at [[Lindon]]'s request, Dross deactivated the versions of himself residing within both [[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Dross]] may influence the oracle codex.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c4">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Dross]] is a companion to [[Mercy]] who can manifest.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Dross]] is a character capable of communication with [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Dross]] receives and transmits information beamed by the [[Presence of the Wolves]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Dross]] suggests there is an enemy involved.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Dross]] can manifest on [[Mercy]]'s shoulder.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Dross]]'s connection to the [[Way]] has been reduced, lowering his predictive ability.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Dross]] has spiked teeth.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Dross]] manifested himself wearing the pure-white halo of the [[Silent King]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Dross]] reacts to [[Lindon]]'s fall.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Dross]] can sense the meaning of a giant raven's caw but struggles to keep it from slipping through to [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Dross]] can communicate with [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Dross]]'s voice provided a warning about the [[Herald]] threat.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Dross]] is a combat [[Presence]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c10">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Dross]] can reach out a tendril to pat someone on the shoulder.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Dross]] uses [[Silent King’s madra]] to project audible speech illusions.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Dross]] has a single purple eye and boneless arms.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Dross]] has the power of memory.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Dross]] can read memories.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Dross]] can manifest a white halo when using power.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Dross]] is a character capable of using illusions.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Dross]] communicates via mental messages to [[Ziel]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Dross]] has learned to mimic human speech.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Dross]] spies on [[Eternity]] facilities for [[Ziel]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Dross]] is a character who can create illusions.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Dross]] can lead the group to the laboratory.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Dross]] can ditch his [[veil]] to hold off [[G-42]]'s consciousness.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Dross]] warns that witnessing a human with great power can set locals on a bad [[fate]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Dross]] accompanied [[Ziel]] on a mission.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Dross]] is a [[Presence]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Dross]] suggested showing who would win if [[Akura Malice]] and [[Northstrider]] fought.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Dross]] is a red entity that checks [[Yerin]]'s armor integrity.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Lindon]] used one of [[Dross]]' soul-trapping geodes to create a crystalline castle.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Dross]] suggested the name Pulchritude.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Dross]] had deactivated the versions of himself inside [[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]] at [[Lindon]]'s request.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c13">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Dross]] is a character that prods [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c14">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|“You’re a memory construct, aren’t you?”<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c6" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|“I am the Eye of the Deep now,” Dross said confidently.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c8" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|“What we have here is the refiner's garden,” Dross said from the gem in Lindon's pocket.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|With a fully formed consciousness and madra system. Tied to… His eyes widened, and he slowly shut the box of Heaven’s Drops, setting it to one side. “…tied to his brain…”<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“I’m examining him to see if his initiative and ability to propose solutions are tied to his personality and self-awareness,” Northstrider responded.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7" />}}
